---
title: "Figure 1 — Cytokine Comparison with Model-Based p-values"
author: "Data Science for Biology Workshop"
format: pdf
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ============================================================================
# Setup: Load packages
# ============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)

set.seed(42)
```

## Data Import & Merge

```{r data-import, include=FALSE}
# ============================================================================
# Read and merge raw data (same pipeline as session2)
# ============================================================================

participant_meta <- read_csv("data/group_b_menstruation/01_participant_metadata_period.csv",
                             show_col_types = FALSE)
sample_ids <- read_csv("data/group_b_menstruation/00_sample_ids_period.csv",
                       show_col_types = FALSE)
luminex <- read_csv("data/group_b_menstruation/02_luminex_period.csv",
                    show_col_types = FALSE)

analysis_data <- sample_ids %>%
  left_join(participant_meta, by = c("pid", "arm")) %>%
  left_join(luminex, by = "sample_id") %>%
  mutate(log_conc = log1p(conc)) %>%
  select(pid, pcos_status, age, arm, period_product, time_point,
         cytokine, conc, log_conc) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cytokine))
```

## Load Model Results

```{r load-model-results, include=FALSE}
# ============================================================================
# Read the mixed-effects model results
# Model: log_conc ~ pcos_status + time_point + (1|pid)
# ============================================================================

model_results <- read_csv("Model_Results_PCOS_Cytokines.csv",
                          show_col_types = FALSE)

# Build annotation labels — one clean BH-adjusted p-value per cytokine
pval_anno <- model_results %>%
  mutate(
    # Format: "adj. p = 0.332" (three decimal places for non-significant)
    label = case_when(
      p_adjusted < 0.001 ~ "adj. p < 0.001",
      p_adjusted < 0.01  ~ paste0("adj. p = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_adjusted)),
      p_adjusted < 0.05  ~ paste0("adj. p = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_adjusted)),
      TRUE               ~ paste0("adj. p = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_adjusted))
    )
  ) %>%
  select(cytokine, label)
```

## Figure 1 — Cytokine Comparison with BH-Adjusted p-values

```{r cytokine-figure, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
# ============================================================================
# Boxplots of log-transformed cytokine concentrations by PCOS status
# Each panel annotated with Benjamini-Hochberg adjusted p-value
# from the linear mixed-effects model
# ============================================================================

# Compute y-position for each cytokine panel (place label at top-right)
anno_positions <- analysis_data %>%
  group_by(cytokine) %>%
  summarise(
    y_max = max(log_conc, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_range = diff(range(log_conc, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(pval_anno, by = "cytokine") %>%
  mutate(
    x = 1.5,
    y = y_max + y_range * 0.10
  )

# Create the boxplot
p <- analysis_data %>%
  ggboxplot(x = "pcos_status", y = "log_conc",
            color = "pcos_status",
            palette = c("#0072B5", "#BC3C29"),
            add = "jitter",
            add.params = list(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.2)) +
  facet_wrap(~ cytokine, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  labs(title = "Inflammatory Marker Levels by PCOS Status",
       subtitle = "p-values from linear mixed-effects model, BH-adjusted for multiple testing",
       x = NULL,
       y = "log(1 + concentration)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9, colour = "grey40"),
    strip.text    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.title  = element_blank(),
    legend.text   = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# Add one clean p-value annotation per panel
p <- p + geom_text(
  data = anno_positions,
  aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
  size     = 3.2,
  colour   = "grey30",
  fontface = "italic",
  inherit.aes = FALSE
)

print(p)

# Save figure
ggsave("Figure_1_Cytokine_Comparison_with_pvalues.pdf",
       plot = p, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```
